criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Content Variety
criteria.description: Diversity and quantity of content available.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalization and recommendations.
criteria.sources: App features, tech blogs, company announcements

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality of the app.

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, company websites

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, company websites
